summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 13 new features in 4th iteration. Backend APIs 100% functional (31/31 tests passed). Frontend features mostly working with minor UI navigation issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Period tabs (Today, This Week, All Time) not clearly visible or clickable in UI
Mode tabs (30s, 1min, 3min, 5min) not visible in Win Go game page
Auto-bet fields (Stop Win, Stop Loss, Auto Cashout) not visible when auto-bet is enabled
ui_bugs.selector: text=Stop Win, text=Stop Loss, text=Auto Cashout

ui_bugs.issue: Admin dashboard not loading properly for admin user

passed_tests: All 31 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Admin and user authentication
Leaderboard endpoints: daily, weekly, all-time, per-game filters (wingo, aviator, abfun, luckyhit, soccergo)
Daily Bonus system: status, claim, spin wheel with all required fields
VIP tier system with bronze/silver/gold/diamond tiers and progression
Achievements system with 8 achievement badges and earned status tracking
Live Feed system showing recent big wins with player masking
Terms & Conditions system with acceptance tracking
Bet Limits system with daily/weekly limits and enable/disable toggle
Admin Live Monitor with real-time stats (active users, today bets, deposits, revenue)
Win Go multi-mode support (30s, 60s, 180s, 300s modes) - backend working
Aviator game features with current state and history - backend working
Live Feed ticker visible on lobby showing recent wins
Quick Actions row with Daily Bonus, Leaderboard, Achievements links
VIP status display in user profile (Bronze tier shown)
Login streak display (32 days shown)
Onboarding overlay appears for new users with 5-step tutorial
Terms modal functionality for new user acceptance
Profile page with VIP Status, Achievements, and Bet Limits sections
Daily Bonus page with Login Streak calendar and Spin the Wheel
Aviator page with Auto-Bet section visible
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix UI visibility issues: 1) Leaderboard period tabs not clearly visible, 2) Win Go mode tabs not showing, 3) Aviator auto-bet fields not appearing when enabled, 4) Admin dashboard access issue for admin users. All backend APIs are working perfectly.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (31/31 tests passed), Frontend: 75% (most features working, some UI visibility issues)
